top_signals.title: Treasuries Fall Most in Two Weeks on Rate-Hike Bets
top_signals.summary: Treasuries slid, heading for their biggest drop in more than two weeks, after an escalation in US-Iran tensions lifted oil prices and added to expectations that the Federal Reserve will raise interest rates this year.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Dulux owner Akzo Nobel plummets 18% after takeover talks fall through
top_signals.summary: Investors are also continuing to monitor developments in the U.S.-Iran war after tensions escalated overnight.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Statistical Notice 2026/05 - Implementation of Bank of England Statistics Taxonomy v1.3.1
top_signals.summary: Statistical Notices update the definitions and guidance contained in the Banking Statistics Yellow Folder
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: CISA Adds Two Known Exploited Vulnerabilities to Catalog
top_signals.summary:
CISA has added two new vulnerabilities to its Known Exploited Vulnerabilities (KEV) Catalog, based on evidence of active exploitation.

  • CVE-2022-0492 Linux Kernel Improper Authentication Vulnerability
  • CVE-2025-48595 Android Framework Integer Overflow Vulnerability

These types of vulnerabilities are a frequent attack vector for malicious cyber actors and pose significant risks to the federal enterprise.

Binding Operational Directive (BOD) 22-01: Reducing the Significant Risk of Known Exploited Vulnerabilities established the KEV Catalog as a living list of known Common Vulnerabilities and Exposures (CVEs) that carry significant risk to the federal enterprise. BOD 22-01 requires Federal Civilian Executive Branch (FCEB) agencies to remediate identified vulnerabilities by the due date to protect FCEB networks against active threats. See the BOD 22-01 Fact Sheet for more information.

Although BOD 22-01 only applies to FCEB agencies, CISA strongly urges all organizations to reduce their exposure to cyberattacks by prioritizing timely remediation of KEV Catalog vulnerabilities as part of their vulnerability management practice. CISA will continue to add vulnerabilities to the catalog that meet the specified criteria.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Potential liquidity or banking-system instability affecting financial conditions.

top_signals.title: Bitcoin trails stocks by most since 2019 as traders get their kicks elsewhere
top_signals.summary: Bitcoin hasn't had this cold a winter in seven years.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: SpaceX Is Said to Target $75 Billion in IPO at $135 Per Share
top_signals.summary: SpaceX is planning to offer shares ​at $135 apiece to raise $75 ​billion in its ⁠initial public ​offering, according to people familiar with the matter, departing from expectations by setting a fixed price more than a week before the expected trading.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: KKR, Ares, Blackstone tumble as Partners Group caps private equity fund withdrawals
top_signals.summary: U.S. private markets firms fell on Wednesday, as concerns over redemption pressure returned to the spotlight.
